final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: National Geographic-style editorial photo, landscape cover shot
Primary request: sweeping wide-angle photograph of a massive blue glacier and a colony of hundreds of emperor penguins marching across sea ice near the Ross Ice Shelf, Antarctica, under midnight sun
Scene/backdrop: Ross Ice Shelf, Antarctica; vast sea ice foreground, distant icebergs floating on calm polar ocean, low sun hovering near the horizon casting surreal golden-cold light
Subject: enormous blue glacier with layered textures ranging from pale ice-blue to deep cobalt, with mysterious blue light glowing from within crevasses; a procession of hundreds of emperor penguins forming a dramatic column across the sea ice; foreground close-up of 2–3 emperor penguins showing crisp black-and-white plumage and vivid orange-yellow beak detail, with fluffy chicks nestled at parents' feet
Style/medium: photorealistic polar nature photography, editorial documentary style
Composition/framing: ultra-wide angle lens (16–20mm), low horizon placement, deep foreground-to-background depth, layered composition — penguin close-ups in foreground, marching colony in midground, towering glacier and icebergs in background
Lighting/mood: Antarctic midnight sun; pale golden warm light from low sun on the horizon contrasting with cool blue-white ice tones; cold-warm interplay across the entire scene; serene yet awe-inspiring
Color palette: deep cobalt and pale ice-blue glacier tones + black-and-white penguin plumage + orange-yellow beak accents + pale gold horizon sky + steel-grey calm ocean
Materials/textures: photorealistic ice surface with layered translucent blue striations and fracture lines, realistic penguin feathers with individual strand detail, soft downy chick fur, reflective sea ice surface
Constraints: preserve the scale contrast between the massive glacier and the penguin colony; keep the chick-parent interaction visible in the foreground; maintain true-to-life color accuracy without oversaturation
Avoid: cartoon or illustrated style, deformed penguin anatomy, oversaturated neon colors, artificial vignetting, watermark
